meta.title: Yunxing AI — Enterprise AI App Platform
meta.description: Build, deploy, and manage AI applications faster. RAG knowledge bases, streaming chat, and multi-tenant collaboration in one platform.

hero.title: Bring AI
hero.description: Yunxing AI helps teams ship intelligent apps faster: visual configuration, knowledge-augmented answers, streaming chat, and workspace collaboration—from prototype to production.

preview.userMessage: Summarize this week's product updates from the knowledge base
preview.assistantMessage: Retrieved 3 documents. Highlights: new RAG strict mode, streaming chat improvements, and refined workspace permissions…

features.title: Built for real-world delivery
features.subtitle: Everything you need to launch AI products your business can trust

apps.title: AI app builder
apps.description: Configure prompts, variables, and models visually to launch customer-ready intelligent apps.

rag.title: Knowledge & RAG
rag.description: Ingest documents, chunk and index vectors, and ground answers in your enterprise knowledge.

chat.title: Streaming chat
chat.description: SSE streaming with full conversation history—native chat UX for validation and support.

workspace.title: Multi-tenant teams
workspace.description: Workspace isolation, invites, and permissions designed for enterprise collaboration.

workflow.title: Three steps to your first app
workflow.subtitle: Skip heavy infrastructure—focus on business outcomes

one.title: Create an app
one.description: Set models, system prompts, and variables to define behavior and tone.

two.title: Connect knowledge
two.description: Upload PDFs and Word docs, choose chunking strategies, and build vector indexes.

three.title: Ship & iterate
three.description: Publish your app and validate in chat—iterate continuously on real feedback.

cta.title: Ready to build your first AI app?
cta.description: Jump into the workspace and experience the full flow from setup to conversation.
